attr.title: Nuclear Blaze
attr.desc: Nuclear Blaze is a 2D action firefighting game by Deepnight Games. Fight through a mysterious military facility as an elite firefighter, rescuing survivors and battling increasingly dangerous blazes.
attr.inst_md:
### Steam Instructions
Copy `linux/hlboot.dat` and `res.pak` from the Steam install into the port's `gamedata` folder.
### Itch.io Instructions
Copy `hlboot.dat` and `res.pak` from the itch.io download into the port's `gamedata` folder.

The patcher will automatically patch the bytecode and compress textures on first launch. This takes about 15-30 minutes.
